and Mercury and Rahu throughout their passage.
It is true that there are varieties of good ami bad effects which
I am going to explain shortly. But before 1 take up that task
I should like to tell you some other detail about this. It is
what is called \ 1 DHA. which means piercing in literal parlance,
but here "undoing" or 'cancellation" For every place producing

TRANSITS 247
good or bad effects there is a place called Vedha which when
occupied by some other planet nullifies the previous effects.
For example, the Sun is good in transit when he passes through
the 3rd house, but its Vedha is the 9th house. The idea is that
although the Sun transiting the 3rd house from the natal Moon
should yield very good results, still there would be nothing good
coming out of this position if at that time some planet (other
than Saturn) transits the 9th house from the Moon. In the same
